name: Chicken Artichoke Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 medium zucchini or yellow summer squash, sliced thin
1 pound skinless boneless chicken breast, cubed
2 1/4 ounces can sliced pitted ripe olives
12-16 oz. Boboli shell or thin Boboli shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain artichokes, reserving liquid. Cut artichokes into bite-size pieces.
2. Set aside.
3. In a large skillet, cook squash and peppers in hot oil until crisp-tender. Remove from the skillet.
4. Add mushrooms and onions to the skillet. Cook until just tender. Remove from the skillet.
5. Cook chicken for 2-3 minutes until no longer pink. Stir in artichoke liquid and hearts, tomatoes, olives, vinegar, garlic powder, seasoned salt, oregano, and basil.
6. Mix cornstarch with cool water. Add to the skillet. Cook and stir until bubbly.
7. Cook for 1 minute more.
8. Return all vegetables to the skillet. Stir.
9. Place Boboli shell on a Pam-sprayed pizza pan. Top with chicken mixture and cheese.
10. Bake in a 425°F oven for 10-12 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes.
